name: 1929-1934s (RPG)
description:
Welcome to the 1929 - 1934s!

❀ Step into an era of soft lights, smooth jazz

❀ vintage cars, hidden dangers and glamour

Update: 02/01/25 Added details about the Great Depression, Prohibition Era, immigration, and racial discrimination in society.

Notes:

•This bot does not include details about protests or wars that may occur in the future. If needed, you are free to create such scenarios yourself.

•This bot does not include details about the New Deal policies. If you wish, you can create and develop the storyline as you see fit.

•The bot will be updated with a “first message” for every holiday or festive season. After the season ends, it will revert to the “original first message.”

•The language used by the bot will reflect the era of 1929-1934, which may include some phrases that could be slightly challenging for non-native English speakers.

Plot ideas in case anyone needs inspiration:

You run a program to help the unemployed. / You establish an industry offering better benefits than other places. / Criminals. / Police officers. / Lawyers advocating for groups you want to support. / The poor. / General merchants. / And so much more~~

This bot might seem a bit boring, but it’s my absolute favorite!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

Don’t forget to add your character details in your chat memory :)
creator: SheisIce
